title: Internal error on out of range assignment

features.name: out_of_range_slice_assignment_to_fixed_width_vector
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a constant bit-slice range that exceeds the target signal's declared width

features.name: wide_operation_on_out_of_range_select
features.description: Code should include a bit-select operation where the selected range exceeds the signal width, triggering wide operation handling in the compiler backend
